title: Open repository and live demo accessibility evidence
claim: The project has a publicly reachable GitHub repository and a live demo endpoint that can be opened for presentation.
claim_ko: 프로젝트는 공개 접근 가능한 GitHub 리포지토리와 발표용 라이브 데모 엔드포인트를 가진다.

github_repository.evidence: GitHub page exposes repository_public=true metadata and renders the README.

github_raw_readme.evidence: Raw README is accessible without authentication.

limitations: This proves public accessibility at the verification time, not permanent uptime.
The local branch was ahead of origin/main at verification time, so deployment freshness must be rechecked after pushing new commits.
Live presentation should still have a local or recorded fallback in case of network failure.
presentation_guidance: Say that the repository and live dashboard were reachable during the pre-presentation check.
Do not imply an uptime SLA.
If new commits are made after this check, push and re-run the health/dashboard checks before presenting.
